scripts.dev:all: node scripts/ensure-lan-env.mjs && node scripts/open-lan-firewall.mjs && node scripts/check-lan.mjs && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:android:push: node scripts/android-push-dev.mjs && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all:lan: node scripts/ensure-lan-env.mjs && node scripts/open-lan-firewall.mjs && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api:lan" "npm run dev:web:lan"
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/ensure-api-env.mjs && node scripts/wait-db.mjs && node scripts/run-python.mjs -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file infra/.env down -v && node scripts/setup-db.mjs
